misc.title: あれから28年…！！ ライブドアニュース (@livedoornews) 【ピカっ！】本日3月27日は「ポケットピカチュウ」発売日 1998年3月27日に任天堂から発売された、歩数計と育成ゲームが合体したアイテム。ピカチュウと一緒にお散歩することで、「お友達度」を上げていく。後にカラー版も発売され、『金・銀』と通信することでアイテム獲得が可能となった。 — https://nitter.net/l

misc.text: Fallece Amelia Jara, una de las voces de España que marcaron a toda una generación. Fue Naranjito, Carlitos Brown, Chuckie en RUGRATS, Isabella en TITANIC y también la escuchamos en OLIVER Y BENJI, SLAYERS o POKEMON, entre otras producciones. Descansa en paz.

misc.title: [#ONEPIECE1178] A Thread 🧵 Chapter Review/Analysis/Rating —————————————— I will be discussing the highlights. “Imu Vs Luffy & Loki” “Where Is Bilbo” “The Heart Is The Source” “Imu Is Coming Soon” ———
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE1178] A Thread 🧵 Chapter Review/Analysis/Rating —————————————— I will be discussing the highlights. “Imu Vs Luffy & Loki” “Where Is Bilbo” “The Heart Is The Source” “Imu Is Coming Soon” —————————————— At the end of this, I will give my ratings for this chapter & my actual thoughts. Let’s begin this shit!

misc.title: He's made of rubber AND he has an afro!
misc.text: He's made of rubber AND he has an afro!

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1178 It's crazy how Luffy says his crew should step/stay away from the fight because they could end up as collateral damage in the fight between Imu and Loki/Luffy... 😭😭
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1178 It's crazy how Luffy says his crew should step/stay away from the fight because they could end up as collateral damage in the fight between Imu and Loki/Luffy... 😭😭

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1178 I'm being honest with you guys, Imu will 100% not lose this fight (if he does, I'll wear a new avatar of your choice for a week), I'm that sure. Guys, look at what Joyboy did to Egghead
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1178 I'm being honest with you guys, Imu will 100% not lose this fight (if he does, I'll wear a new avatar of your choice for a week), I'm that sure. Guys, look at what Joyboy did to Egghead with just his Haki... An entire Navy fleet with many Vice Admirals was knocked out, Gorosei were crippled out too... Luffy didn´t reached that level Joyboy yet, who lost to Imu, and it doesn't matter how he did it, you can be sure Imu is on the same level as Joyboy. Imu is a god-like creature(ruling over the world over 800 years), and we can see that Luffy and Loki aren't at their best; both are having trouble with nerfs. Imu will soon destroy everything in Elbaph, and the only way to stop him will be to destroy the Magic Circle in the castle and Gunko's one.. That's the only way to stop him; I don't see any other way. Imu will not lose any fight.
